tasks.name: Setup SynthSAEBench-16k environment
tasks.description: Install SAELens, verify SynthSAEBench-16k dataset availability, set up training infrastructure. Verify ground-truth hierarchy labels are accessible.
tasks.expected_output: Environment ready, dataset loaded, ground-truth hierarchy structure verified

tasks.name: Pilot: Baseline ReLU SAE
tasks.description: Train Standard ReLU SAE on SynthSAEBench-16k subset (1,024 features, 1M tokens). Measure ground-truth absorption rate, feature recovery MCC, reconstruction MSE, L0. Validate metrics work on synthetic data.
tasks.expected_output: pilot_baseline_results.json with absorption, MCC, MSE, L0

pilot.pass_criteria: Absorption rate between 0.3-0.7 (reasonable range), MCC > 0.3 (learns structure), MSE < 2.0

tasks.name: Pilot: +TopK SAE
tasks.description: Train TopK SAE (k=50) on same subset. Compare absorption vs. Baseline pilot. If effect size > 0.3, proceed with full experiment.

pilot.pass_criteria: Absorption differs from Baseline by > 0.05 OR confirms null effect

tasks.name: Pilot: +MultiScale SAE
tasks.description: Train MultiScale SAE on same subset. This is the critical pilot---if MultiScale does not show strong absorption reduction, reconsider H1.

pilot.pass_criteria: Absorption reduction vs. Baseline > 0.1 with Cohen's d > 0.5

tasks.name: Pilot: Random decoder control
tasks.description: Initialize SAE with random decoder, do not train. Compute MCC and absorption on subset. Validates metrics discriminate structure from randomness.

tasks.name: Pilot analysis and go/no-go decision
tasks.description: Compare pilot results across Baseline, TopK, MultiScale. Compute effect sizes. If MultiScale shows d > 0.5 and metrics validate, proceed to full experiment. Otherwise, flag for revision.

visualizations.description: Pilot absorption comparison (Baseline vs TopK vs MultiScale)

tasks.name: Full: Baseline ReLU SAE (5 replicates)
tasks.description: Train Standard ReLU SAE on full SynthSAEBench-16k (16,384 features, 10M tokens). 5 independent replicates with seeds 42-46. Compute absorption rate, MCC, MSE, L0, hedging.

tasks.name: Full: +TopK SAE (5 replicates)
tasks.description: Train TopK SAE on full SynthSAEBench-16k. 5 replicates. Compare absorption vs. Baseline.

tasks.name: Full: +MultiScale SAE (5 replicates)
tasks.description: Train MultiScale SAE on full SynthSAEBench-16k. 5 replicates. Primary test of H1.

tasks.name: Full: +Orthogonality SAE (5 replicates)
tasks.description: Train SAE with decoder orthogonality penalty on full SynthSAEBench-16k. 5 replicates. Test H2 ranking.

tasks.name: Full: +Gating SAE (5 replicates)
tasks.description: Train Gated SAE on full SynthSAEBench-16k. 5 replicates. Test H2 ranking.

tasks.name: Full: +Full Matryoshka SAE (5 replicates)
tasks.description: Train Full Matryoshka SAE (TopK + MultiScale + hierarchical loss) on full SynthSAEBench-16k. 5 replicates. Test H3 (absorption-hedging trade-off) and component interactions.

tasks.name: Full: Random decoder control
tasks.description: Random decoder on full SynthSAEBench-16k. No training. Validates metrics on full dataset.

tasks.name: Statistical analysis: ANOVA + effect sizes
tasks.description: One-way ANOVA across 6 variants. Compute Cohen's d for each vs. Baseline. Tukey HSD post-hoc. Holm-Bonferroni correction. Mixed-effects model. Test H1, H2.

visualizations.description: Absorption rate by variant with error bars (5 replicates)
Effect sizes (Cohen's d) per component vs. Baseline with 95% CIs

tasks.name: Trade-off analysis: absorption vs. hedging vs. reconstruction
tasks.description: Compute correlation between absorption and hedging across variants (H3). Identify Pareto frontier on absorption-reconstruction plot (H6). Test H5 (absorption-MCC correlation).

visualizations.description: Absorption vs. reconstruction MSE Pareto frontier (H6)

tasks.name: Component interaction analysis
tasks.description: Compare observed Full Matryoshka absorption to predicted additive effect: predicted = Baseline - (Baseline - MultiScale) - (Baseline - TopK). Test H9 (synergy vs. additivity vs. antagonism).

visualizations.description: Observed vs. predicted Full Matryoshka absorption (additive model)

tasks.name: Training dynamics: absorption emergence (Optional)
tasks.description: Train Standard ReLU SAE with checkpointing every 10% of training. Measure absorption, MCC, MSE at each checkpoint. Test H8 (early emergence, irreversibility).

visualizations.description: Absorption rate, MCC, MSE over training checkpoints

tasks.name: Real-LLM validation: top component on Pythia-160M (Optional)
tasks.description: Train Baseline + top-performing component from Experiment 1 on Pythia-160M activations. Measure first-letter absorption via SAEBench protocol. Compare with architecture leaderboard. Test H4 (synthetic-to-real transfer).

visualizations.description: Synthetic component ranking vs. real-LLM architecture ranking
